sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55617" key="kataxo/reusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταχόρ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n55617.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">song</tr_>, finale of the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Πυθικὸς νόμος</foreign>, representing Apollo's <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dance of triumph</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.84</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
